title: Faithful: PAEColorize param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 9.0 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEColorize must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEColorize to range extremes across hosts ['Objects__Curtains', 'Objects__Veil', 'Stylized__Close_and_Open', 'Stylized__Color_Panels', 'Stylized__Loop', 'Stylized__Slide', 'Stylized__Up-Over'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=9.02 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEColorize implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEColorize` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "intensity", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.35, "oracle_signal": 26.489, "ddb": 9.023}, {"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.35, "oracle_signal": 26.489, "ddb": 9.023}, {"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "remapwhiteto/blue", "theta": 1.0, "t": 0.35, "oracle_signal": 18.054, "ddb": 11.772}, {"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "intensity", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 63.944, "ddb": 11.789}, {"host": "Objects__Curtains", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 63.944, "ddb": 11.789}, {"host": "Stylized__Slide", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.65, "oracle_signal": 116.282, "ddb": 12.319}]
